steps.title: Find the constant ratio $f(x)/x$
steps.content: The relationship is linear through the origin: $f(x) = kx$. Pick any row from the table and divide $f(x)$ by $x$.

steps.title: Compute the ratio
steps.content:
Each row of the table gives $f(x)/x = 1.8$ (gallons per square foot). So $f(x) = 1.8x$.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
